feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: TRINITY COLLEGE· UNIVERSITY OF CAMBRIDGE· DECEMBER 2016
entry.content:
Authors: SW Thomas

Abstract: ... moving from an era of exoplanet detection to one of characterisation. But ... to briefly review what is currently achievable in exoplanet science. ... ously absent from our solar system—except for the icy moons of Jupiter ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

entry.title: On the importance of laboratory experiments for interpreting exoplanet observations
entry.content:
Authors: MA Thompson - Astrophysics and Space Science, 2026

Abstract: ... 6, we briefly discuss astrobiology laboratory experiments that are important for assessing potential exoplanet biosignatures with next-... bodies (eg, volcanoes on Io, cryovolcanic plumes on Enceladus and Europa ). Similarly, analytical methods can ...

entry.title: Mineral-facilitated aqueous synthesis of hydrogen cyanide from prebiotically abundant amino acids for chemical evolution

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: Z Yang, Y Li, N Kitadai, M Yamamoto, Y Ueno, Y Lu... - Proceedings of the National ..., 2026

Abstract: ... Origin of life strongly relies on reactive carbon and nitrogen precursors, among which hydrogen cyanide (HCN) is one of the most versatile ... Here, we report aqueous phase synthesis of HCN from amino acids promoted by minerals, which ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, brain, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Origin of Life as a Physical Process: A Framework Based on Space Element and Primordial Centripetal Attraction

entry.content:
Authors: S Ray

Abstract: ... The origin of life remains one of the most fundamental unsolved problems in science. Existing models, including the RNA World Hypothesis, ... In this work, a new physical framework for the origin of life is proposed, based on the concepts of ...

entry.title: Prebiotic Bimuno® GOS reduces illness symptoms and supports gut barrier function and immunity after intermittent exercise in the heat

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: CJ Parker, SJ Abbott, LR Butterfield, KA Hunter... - Experimental Physiology, 2026

Abstract: Exercise in hot climates increases the risk of gastrointestinal (GI) disruption and respiratory illness. We investigated the effects of a 42 day prebiotic intervention on markers of intestinal epithelial injury, GI discomfort and immunity following football ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, brain, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: The impact of prebiotic supplementation in a triple-hit rat model of schizophrenia

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: SB Plesz, KF Szűcs, B Ágg, N Makra, B Ligeti... - Neuropharmacology, 2026

Abstract: Schizophrenia is associated with cognitive deficits and higher stress sensitivity, potentially related to gut-brain axis disturbances, partially due to dysbiosis. To ascertain this phenomenon, we aimed to evaluate these behavioral phenotypes in ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, brain, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology
